decision_loop.explanation: I chose hide. This action predicted outcome 'resource_gain'. According to my preference model this outcome has high preferred probability (0.99), resulting in low risk (0.007). expected free energy (0.151) stayed lowest, so risk, ambiguity, and predicted error were minimized. Even though rest had lower expected free energy (0.105 vs 0.151), hide still achieved the strongest final policy score (-0.014 vs -0.029) after memory, pattern, and identity terms were included. This aligns with my resource_conservatism=0.55 and risk_aversion=0.65.
